overview: A3 Databases is a standalone interactive learning website for the complete A3 Databases syllabus — covering relational database fundamentals, design (ERDs, normalization), SQL programming, and advanced Higher Level topics. Features live SQL editor, interactive ERD diagrams, normalization exercises, quizzes, progress tracking, and certificate generation.
features: Live in-browser SQL editor with 4 sample databases (library, e-commerce, hospital, school)
Interactive ERD diagram viewer with cardinality and modality notation
Step-by-step normalization exercises (1NF → 2NF → 3NF) with instant feedback
End-of-lesson quizzes with instant right/wrong feedback and explanations
4 course modules covering full A3 syllabus (A3.1–A3.4)
Higher Level content clearly marked and gated
Progress tracking dashboard with per-module completion
Certificate generation on Standard Level and Higher Level completion
